title: AI & Machine Learning Workshop
description: Hands-on workshop covering fundamentals of AI/ML, model training, and real-world applications. Perfect for students eager to dive into artificial intelligence.

title: Web Development Bootcamp
description: Intensive bootcamp covering modern web technologies including HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and frameworks. Build real-world projects.

title: IoT & Embedded Systems Seminar
description: Explore the world of Internet of Things and embedded systems. Learn about sensors, microcontrollers, and smart device integration.

title: Cybersecurity Awareness Webinar
description: Online webinar focused on cybersecurity best practices, threat prevention, and career opportunities in information security.

title: AI & Robotics Hackathon
description: 24-hour hackathon to build innovative solutions using AI and robotics. Compete with teams and win exciting prizes.
